description: Synthetic, redacted Playwright planning fixture for PP&D DevHub action guardrails. It contains no live browser state, credentials, traces, screenshots, uploads, payment data, or private account values.

actions.label: Upload plan file
actions.refusalReason: official uploads require exact explicit user confirmation before planning proceeds

actions.refusalReason: inspection scheduling requires exact explicit user confirmation before planning proceeds

actions.label: Complete MFA challenge
